name: Cappuccino Cream Muffins with Chocolate Ripple
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease muffin cups or line with paper baking cups.
2. Chocolate Ripple: Mix flour, sugar, and cinnamon in a small bowl. Cut in butter until mixture resembles fine crumbs. Stir in chopped chocolate. Set aside.
3. Batter: Dissolve coffee in hot water, cool. Mix flour, sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt in a large bowl. Beat eggs, sour cream, melted butter, and coffee together with a whisk or fork. Stir liquid into dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened. Batter will be stiff.
4. Spoon half the batter into muffin cups. Spoon a heaping tablespoon of ripple mixture on top. Top with remaining batter.
5. Bake at 400°F for 20 - 25 minutes, or till firm to the touch. Cool in pan for 5 minutes, then remove muffins and cool on a rack. If desired, drizzle melted chocolate over top of muffins.
